devices.name: Intel/AMD x86_64 (generic)
devices.notes: Default x86_64 profile enabling asm paths and AVX2-aware defaults.

devices.name: Apple Silicon aarch64
devices.notes: Apple M1/M2 family. Prefer compiler intrinsics over inline asm.

devices.name: Raspberry Pi aarch64
devices.notes: Lower core count and conservative defaults for SBCs.

devices.name: WebAssembly (wasm32)
devices.notes: WASM environment; no inline asm and single-threaded by default.
